---
title: "Chondrocyte comparison analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))
```

```{r load_libraries, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(circular)
library(patchwork)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(ggrepel)
library(forcats)
library(Matrix)
```

```{r load_data}
# ── Read circadian tables ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
osmo_data      <- read.csv("results/tables/osmo_circ.csv")
dex_data       <- read.csv("results/tables/dex_circ.csv")
hs_data        <- read.csv("results/tables/hs_circ.csv")
cartilage_data <- read.csv("results/tables/wt_cartilage_circ.csv")

# Standardise cartilage column names to match chondrocyte datasets
cartilage_data <- cartilage_data %>%
  dplyr::rename(Row.names = CycID)

# ── Filter to rhythmic genes ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
osmo_trimmed      <- osmo_data      %>% filter(BH.Q < 0.05)
dex_trimmed       <- dex_data       %>% filter(BH.Q < 0.05)
hs_trimmed        <- hs_data        %>% filter(BH.Q < 0.05)
cartilage_trimmed <- cartilage_data %>% filter(BH.Q < 0.05)

cat("Rhythmic genes (BH.Q < 0.05):\n")
cat("  Osmo:      ", nrow(osmo_trimmed), "\n")
cat("  Dex:       ", nrow(dex_trimmed), "\n")
cat("  HS:        ", nrow(hs_trimmed), "\n")
cat("  Cartilage: ", nrow(cartilage_trimmed), "\n")

# ── Load RDS time-series data for expression plots ───────────────────────────
hs_plot        <- readRDS("results/shiny_data/mouse/hs/hs_data.rds")
osmo_plot      <- readRDS("results/shiny_data/mouse/osmo/osmo_data.rds")
dex_plot       <- readRDS("results/shiny_data/mouse/dex/dex_data.rds")
cartilage_plot <- readRDS("results/shiny_data/mouse/cartilage_circ/cartilage_wt_data.rds")

dataset_list <- list(
  HS        = hs_plot,
  Osmo      = osmo_plot,
  Dex       = dex_plot,
  cartilage = cartilage_plot
)

# ── Output directory ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
dir.create("results/publication_figures", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r helper_functions}
# ── Helper: multi-dataset expression time-series plot ───────────────────────
multi_dataset_plot <- function(data_list, gene, show_line = TRUE, legend = TRUE) {
  filtered_list <- lapply(names(data_list), function(dataset_name) {
    data_list[[dataset_name]] %>%
      filter(Gene == gene) %>%
      mutate(dataset = dataset_name)
  })
  combined_data <- bind_rows(filtered_list)
  if (nrow(combined_data) == 0) {
    cat("Gene not found in any dataset:", gene, "\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  p <- ggplot(combined_data, aes(x = as.numeric(time_point), y = mean, color = dataset)) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      plot.title   = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      legend.position = if (legend) "bottom" else "none",
      legend.title = element_blank()
    ) +
    labs(x = "Circadian Time", y = "Expression", title = gene) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 6,  linetype = "dashed", color = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 12, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sd, ymax = mean + sd), width = 0.2, alpha = 0.7)
  if (show_line) p <- p + geom_line(linewidth = 0.75)
  time_breaks <- sort(unique(as.numeric(combined_data$time_point)))
  n_breaks    <- length(time_breaks)
  ct_values   <- seq(4, by = 4, length.out = n_breaks)
  ct_labels   <- ifelse(seq_len(n_breaks) %% 2 == 1, ct_values, "")
  p + scale_x_continuous(breaks = time_breaks, labels = ct_labels)
}

plot_multiple_genes <- function(data_list, genes, show_line = TRUE) {
  plots <- lapply(genes, function(gene) multi_dataset_plot(data_list, gene, show_line))
  wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 3)
}

# ── Helper: phase distribution rose plot ────────────────────────────────────
create_rose_plot <- function(data, dataset_name) {
  dataset_data <- data %>% filter(dataset == dataset_name)
  all_phases   <- data.frame(phase_circular = c(0, 4, 8, 12, 16, 20))
  dataset_data <- all_phases %>%
    left_join(dataset_data, by = "phase_circular") %>%
    mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
           phase_plot = phase_circular + 2)
  ggplot(dataset_data, aes(x = phase_plot, y = count)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7,
             color = "black", width = 3) +
    coord_polar(start = -pi/6, direction = 1) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = c(2, 6, 10, 14, 18, 22),
      labels = c("CT0/24", "CT4", "CT8", "CT12", "CT16", "CT20"),
      limits = c(0, 24)
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title  = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray80", linewidth = 0.5),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    ) +
    labs(title    = dataset_name,
         subtitle = sprintf("n = %d rhythmic genes", sum(dataset_data$count)),
         x = NULL, y = "Number of Genes")
}

# ── Helper: pairwise overlap with pair-specific universe ─────────────────────
hypergeometric_test_pairwise_universe <- function(list1, list2, universe) {
  universe      <- unique(universe)
  original_size1 <- length(unique(list1))
  original_size2 <- length(unique(list2))
  list1 <- intersect(unique(list1), universe)
  list2 <- intersect(unique(list2), universe)
  overlap      <- length(intersect(list1, list2))
  size1        <- length(list1)
  size2        <- length(list2)
  genome_size  <- length(universe)
  expected     <- (size1 * size2) / genome_size
  fold_enrichment <- ifelse(expected > 0, overlap / expected, NA_real_)
  jaccard      <- ifelse(length(union(list1, list2)) > 0,
                         overlap / length(union(list1, list2)), NA_real_)
  p_value <- phyper(overlap - 1, size1, genome_size - size1, size2, lower.tail = FALSE)
  list(universe_size = genome_size,
       original_size1 = original_size1, original_size2 = original_size2,
       overlap = overlap, size1 = size1, size2 = size2,
       expected = expected, fold_enrichment = fold_enrichment,
       jaccard = jaccard, p_value = p_value)
}

# ── Helper: clock-relative phase computation ─────────────────────────────────
get_phase_by_symbol <- function(data, gene_symbol,
                                symbol_col = "mgi_symbol", phase_col = "phase") {
  row <- data %>% filter(!!sym(symbol_col) == gene_symbol)
  if (nrow(row) == 0) return(NA)
  row[[phase_col]][1]
}

compute_clock_relative_phase <- function(data, ref_phase,
                                         symbol_col = "mgi_symbol",
                                         phase_col  = "phase") {
  data %>% mutate(
    clock_relative_phase = (!!sym(phase_col) - ref_phase) %% 24,
    clock_relative_phase = ifelse(clock_relative_phase > 12,
                                  clock_relative_phase - 24,
                                  clock_relative_phase)
  )
}

circ_dist_24 <- function(a, b) {
  d <- abs(a - b) %% 24
  ifelse(d > 12, 24 - d, d)
}

# ── Helpers: local pathway enrichment and overlap permutation ────────────────
normalise_ensembl_gene_ids <- function(x) {
  x <- sub("[.][0-9]+$", "", trimws(as.character(x)))
  x[is.na(x) | !nzchar(x)] <- NA_character_
  x
}

resolve_reference_file <- function(filename, url, existing_paths = character(),
                                   cache_dir = file.path(
                                     "results", "cache", "pathway_annotations"
                                   )) {
  cache_path <- file.path(cache_dir, filename)
  candidates <- unique(c(
    existing_paths,
    file.path("data", "raw", filename),
    cache_path
  ))
  available <- candidates[file.exists(candidates)]
  if (length(available) > 0) {
    message("Using cached reference: ", available[[1]])
    return(available[[1]])
  }

  dir.create(cache_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  partial_path <- paste0(cache_path, ".part")
  if (file.exists(partial_path)) unlink(partial_path)
  on.exit(if (file.exists(partial_path)) unlink(partial_path), add = TRUE)

  message("Downloading reference data from ", url)
  status <- tryCatch(
    download.file(
      url,
      destfile = partial_path,
      method = "libcurl",
      mode = "wb",
      quiet = FALSE
    ),
    error = function(e) {
      stop(
        "Unable to download required reference file ", filename, ": ",
        conditionMessage(e),
        call. = FALSE
      )
    }
  )
  download_size <- if (file.exists(partial_path)) {
    file.info(partial_path)$size
  } else {
    NA_real_
  }
  if (!isTRUE(status == 0) || is.na(download_size) || download_size <= 0) {
    stop("Download failed or returned an empty file: ", url, call. = FALSE)
  }
  if (!file.rename(partial_path, cache_path)) {
    stop("Could not move downloaded reference into cache: ", cache_path,
         call. = FALSE)
  }
  message("Cached reference at ", cache_path)
  cache_path
}

read_filtered_tsv_gz <- function(path, pattern, column_names,
                                 chunk_size = 100000L) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    stop("Required annotation file not found: ", path, call. = FALSE)
  }

  con <- gzfile(path, open = "rt")
  on.exit(close(con), add = TRUE)
  readLines(con, n = 1L)  # discard header
  pieces <- list()

  repeat {
    lines <- readLines(con, n = chunk_size)
    if (length(lines) == 0) break
    lines <- lines[grepl(pattern, lines)]
    if (length(lines) == 0) next

    text_con <- textConnection(lines)
    piece <- read.delim(
      text_con,
      header = FALSE, sep = "\t", quote = "", comment.char = "",
      col.names = column_names,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    close(text_con)
    pieces[[length(pieces) + 1L]] <- piece
  }

  if (length(pieces) == 0) {
    return(as.data.frame(
      setNames(replicate(length(column_names), character(0), simplify = FALSE),
               column_names),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
  bind_rows(pieces)
}

build_pathway_model <- function(annotation_map, background_genes,
                                category_code, min_term_size = 5L) {
  background_genes <- unique(na.omit(
    normalise_ensembl_gene_ids(background_genes)
  ))

  ann <- annotation_map %>%
    filter(category == category_code, gene_id %in% background_genes) %>%
    distinct(gene_id, term, .keep_all = TRUE)

  term_info <- ann %>%
    group_by(term) %>%
    summarise(
      description = first(description),
      term_size = n_distinct(gene_id),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(term_size >= min_term_size) %>%
    arrange(term)

  if (nrow(term_info) == 0) {
    stop("No eligible terms for category ", category_code, call. = FALSE)
  }

  ann <- ann %>% semi_join(term_info, by = "term")
  gene_index <- match(ann$gene_id, background_genes)
  term_index <- match(ann$term, term_info$term)

  incidence <- Matrix::sparseMatrix(
    i = gene_index,
    j = term_index,
    x = 1L,
    dims = c(length(background_genes), nrow(term_info)),
    dimnames = list(background_genes, term_info$term)
  )

  list(
    category = category_code,
    background = background_genes,
    background_size = length(background_genes),
    gene_index = setNames(seq_along(background_genes), background_genes),
    term_ids = term_info$term,
    descriptions = term_info$description,
    term_sizes = term_info$term_size,
    incidence = incidence
  )
}

calculate_local_enrichment <- function(selected_genes, model) {
  selected_genes <- intersect(unique(selected_genes), model$background)
  selected_index <- unname(model$gene_index[selected_genes])
  n_selected <- length(selected_index)

  hits <- if (n_selected > 0) {
    as.numeric(Matrix::colSums(model$incidence[selected_index, , drop = FALSE]))
  } else {
    numeric(length(model$term_ids))
  }

  p_value <- rep(1, length(model$term_ids))
  has_hits <- hits > 0
  if (n_selected > 0 && any(has_hits)) {
    p_value[has_hits] <- phyper(
      hits[has_hits] - 1,
      model$term_sizes[has_hits],
      model$background_size - model$term_sizes[has_hits],
      n_selected,
      lower.tail = FALSE
    )
  }

  list(
    n_selected = n_selected,
    hits = hits,
    p_value = p_value,
    fdr = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")
  )
}

format_local_enrichment <- function(selected_genes, model, fdr_cutoff = 0.05) {
  stats <- calculate_local_enrichment(selected_genes, model)
  keep <- stats$hits > 0 & stats$fdr <= fdr_cutoff
  n_keep <- sum(keep)

  data.frame(
    category = rep(model$category, n_keep),
    term = model$term_ids[keep],
    number_of_genes = stats$hits[keep],
    number_of_genes_in_background = model$term_sizes[keep],
    p_value = stats$p_value[keep],
    fdr = stats$fdr[keep],
    description = model$descriptions[keep],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>% arrange(fdr, p_value, term)
}

get_top_local_terms <- function(selected_genes, model, n_terms) {
  if (n_terms <= 0) return(character(0))
  stats <- calculate_local_enrichment(selected_genes, model)
  n_terms <- min(as.integer(n_terms), length(model$term_ids))

  # Random tie-breaking avoids repeatedly selecting the same term identifiers
  # when null enrichment P-values are equal.
  ranked <- order(stats$p_value, runif(length(stats$p_value)))
  model$term_ids[ranked[seq_len(n_terms)]]
}

term_jaccard <- function(terms1, terms2) {
  union_size <- length(union(terms1, terms2))
  if (union_size == 0) return(0)
  length(intersect(terms1, terms2)) / union_size
}

conditional_term_overlap_p <- function(universe_size, size1, size2, overlap) {
  if (overlap <= 0) return(1)
  phyper(
    overlap - 1,
    size1,
    universe_size - size1,
    size2,
    lower.tail = FALSE
  )
}

sample_gene_pair_fixed_sizes <- function(background_genes, size1, size2) {
  if (max(size1, size2) > length(background_genes)) {
    stop("Requested gene-set size exceeds the permutation background.",
         call. = FALSE)
  }

  list(
    set1 = sample(background_genes, size1, replace = FALSE),
    set2 = sample(background_genes, size2, replace = FALSE)
  )
}
# ── Helper: enrichment tile heatmap ─────────────────────────────────────────
# ── Helpers: pathway-background sensitivity analyses ────────────────────
build_pathway_models <- function(annotation_map, background_genes, categories,
                                 category_names, min_term_size = 5L) {
  models <- setNames(lapply(categories, function(cat_code) {
    model <- build_pathway_model(
      annotation_map,
      background_genes,
      cat_code,
      min_term_size = min_term_size
    )
    cat(category_names[[cat_code]], ":", length(model$term_ids),
        "eligible terms\n")
    model
  }), categories)
  models
}

calculate_enrichment_lists <- function(gene_sets, pathway_models, categories,
                                       fdr_cutoff = 0.05) {
  setNames(lapply(names(gene_sets), function(ds_name) {
    bind_rows(lapply(categories, function(cat_code) {
      format_local_enrichment(
        gene_sets[[ds_name]],
        pathway_models[[cat_code]],
        fdr_cutoff = fdr_cutoff
      )
    }))
  }), names(gene_sets))
}

format_enrichment_collection <- function(enrichment_list,
                                         background_strategy,
                                         background_description,
                                         pair_context,
                                         background_size) {
  bind_rows(lapply(names(enrichment_list), function(ds_name) {
    x <- enrichment_list[[ds_name]]
    n <- nrow(x)
    bind_cols(
      data.frame(
        Background_Strategy = rep(background_strategy, n),
        Background_Description = rep(background_description, n),
        Pair_Context = rep(pair_context, n),
        Background_Genes = rep(background_size, n),
        dataset = rep(ds_name, n),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ),
      x
    )
  }))
}

run_pathway_overlap_pair <- function(
    background_strategy, background_description, pair,
    background_genes, gene_sets, enrichment_list, pathway_models,
    categories, category_names, n_permutations, permutation_seed) {
  name1 <- pair[1]
  name2 <- pair[2]
  pair_label <- paste(name1, name2, sep = "_vs_")
  genes1 <- gene_sets[[name1]]
  genes2 <- gene_sets[[name2]]
  n_shared_genes <- length(intersect(genes1, genes2))
  results <- data.frame()

  for (cat_index in seq_along(categories)) {
    cat_code <- categories[[cat_index]]
    model <- pathway_models[[cat_code]]
    terms1 <- enrichment_list[[name1]] %>%
      filter(category == cat_code) %>%
      pull(term)
    terms2 <- enrichment_list[[name2]] %>%
      filter(category == cat_code) %>%
      pull(term)
    overlap_term_ids <- intersect(terms1, terms2)
    observed_jaccard <- term_jaccard(terms1, terms2)

    cat(sprintf(
      "[%s] Permuting %s, %s vs %s: %d genes, %d genes, %d shared\n",
      background_strategy, category_names[[cat_code]], name1, name2,
      length(genes1), length(genes2), n_shared_genes
    ))

    # Draw two independent gene sets of the observed sizes. This
    # allows their gene-level intersection to vary and tests total pathway-term
    # overlap arising from both co-rhythmic genes and functional convergence.
    size_only_seed <- permutation_seed + cat_index - 1L
    set.seed(size_only_seed)
    perm_stats <- replicate(n_permutations, {
      perm_genes <- sample_gene_pair_fixed_sizes(
        background_genes, length(genes1), length(genes2)
      )
      perm_terms1 <- get_top_local_terms(
        perm_genes$set1, model, length(terms1)
      )
      perm_terms2 <- get_top_local_terms(
        perm_genes$set2, model, length(terms2)
      )
      c(
        jaccard = term_jaccard(perm_terms1, perm_terms2),
        overlap = length(intersect(perm_terms1, perm_terms2)),
        shared_genes = length(intersect(perm_genes$set1, perm_genes$set2))
      )
    })

    n_as_or_more_extreme <- sum(
      perm_stats["jaccard", ] >= observed_jaccard
    )
    perm_p_value <- (n_as_or_more_extreme + 1) /
      (n_permutations + 1)

    conditional_hypergeom_p <- conditional_term_overlap_p(
      length(model$term_ids), length(terms1), length(terms2),
      length(overlap_term_ids)
    )
    overlap_descriptions <- model$descriptions[
      match(overlap_term_ids, model$term_ids)
    ]

    results <- bind_rows(
      results,
      data.frame(
        Background_Strategy = background_strategy,
        Background_Description = background_description,
        Pair = pair_label,
        Category = category_names[[cat_code]],
        Dataset1 = name1,
        Dataset2 = name2,
        Background_Genes = length(background_genes),
        Rhythmic_Genes_D1 = length(genes1),
        Rhythmic_Genes_D2 = length(genes2),
        Shared_Rhythmic_Genes = n_shared_genes,
        Eligible_Terms = length(model$term_ids),
        Enriched_Terms_D1 = length(terms1),
        Enriched_Terms_D2 = length(terms2),
        Overlap = length(overlap_term_ids),
        Jaccard_Index = observed_jaccard,
        Perm_Null_Mean_Jaccard = mean(perm_stats["jaccard", ]),
        Perm_Null_SD_Jaccard = sd(perm_stats["jaccard", ]),
        Perm_Null_P025_Jaccard = unname(quantile(
          perm_stats["jaccard", ], 0.025
        )),
        Perm_Null_P975_Jaccard = unname(quantile(
          perm_stats["jaccard", ], 0.975
        )),
        Perm_Null_Mean_Overlap = mean(perm_stats["overlap", ]),
        Perm_Null_Mean_Shared_Genes = mean(perm_stats["shared_genes", ]),
        Perm_P_value = perm_p_value,
        Conditional_Hypergeom_P_value = conditional_hypergeom_p,
        N_Perm_As_Or_More_Extreme = n_as_or_more_extreme,
        N_Permutations = n_permutations,
        Size_Only_Seed = size_only_seed,
        Percent_of_D1 = 100 * length(overlap_term_ids) /
          max(length(terms1), 1),
        Percent_of_D2 = 100 * length(overlap_term_ids) /
          max(length(terms2), 1),
        Overlap_Terms = paste(
          sprintf("%s (%s)", overlap_term_ids, overlap_descriptions),
          collapse = "; "
        ),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    )
  }

  results
}

adjust_pathway_overlap_p_values <- function(results) {
  results %>%
    group_by(Background_Strategy) %>%
    mutate(
      Perm_P_BH = p.adjust(Perm_P_value, method = "BH"),
      Significant_Perm_BH = ifelse(Perm_P_BH < 0.05, "Yes", "No"),
      Conditional_Hypergeom_P_BH = p.adjust(
        Conditional_Hypergeom_P_value, method = "BH"
      ),
      Significant_Conditional_BH = ifelse(
        Conditional_Hypergeom_P_BH < 0.05, "Yes", "No"
      )
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    relocate(Perm_P_BH, .after = Perm_P_value) %>%
    relocate(Significant_Perm_BH, .after = Perm_P_BH) %>%
    relocate(Conditional_Hypergeom_P_BH,
             .after = Conditional_Hypergeom_P_value) %>%
    relocate(Significant_Conditional_BH,
             .after = Conditional_Hypergeom_P_BH)
}

# ── Helper: enrichment tile heatmap ────────────────────────────────────────
make_tile_heatmap <- function(data, cat) {
  all_terms    <- data %>% filter(category_label == cat) %>% pull(description) %>% unique()
  all_datasets <- c("Osmo", "Dex", "HS", "Cartilage")
  full_grid    <- expand.grid(description = all_terms, dataset = all_datasets,
                              stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  d <- data %>%
    filter(category_label == cat) %>%
    dplyr::select(description, dataset, neg_log10_fdr, number_of_genes)
  merged <- full_grid %>%
    left_join(d, by = c("description", "dataset")) %>%
    mutate(dataset     = factor(dataset, levels = all_datasets),
           description = fct_reorder(description, neg_log10_fdr,
                                     .fun = function(x) max(x, na.rm = TRUE)))
  ggplot(merged, aes(x = dataset, y = description, fill = neg_log10_fdr)) +
    geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(!is.na(number_of_genes),
                                 as.character(number_of_genes), "")),
              size = 3, colour = "white", fontface = "bold") +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "#fdcc8a", high = "#b30000", na.value = "grey90",
                        name = "-log10(FDR)") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
          plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
          panel.grid  = element_blank()) +
    labs(title = cat, x = NULL, y = NULL,
         caption = "Number in cell = gene count; grey = not significant")
}

# ── Helper: enrichment bar chart ─────────────────────────────────────────────
make_bar_chart <- function(data, cat, dataset_colors) {
  d <- data %>%
    filter(category_label == cat) %>%
    mutate(description = fct_reorder(description, neg_log10_fdr))
  ggplot(d, aes(x = neg_log10_fdr, y = description, fill = dataset)) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.65, alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed",
               colour = "grey40", linewidth = 0.4) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = dataset_colors, name = "Dataset") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
          plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
          legend.position = "right") +
    labs(title = cat, x = "-log10(FDR)", y = NULL,
         caption = "Dashed line = FDR 0.05 | Top 5 terms per dataset")
}
```

```{r Fig1C_overlapping_genes}
# ── 3-way stress overlap (by Ensembl ID) ────────────────────────────────────
stress_overlap_genes <- Reduce(intersect, list(
  osmo_trimmed$Row.names,
  dex_trimmed$Row.names,
  hs_trimmed$Row.names
))

cat("3-way stress overlap: ", length(stress_overlap_genes), " genes\n")

# Extract those genes from cartilage (needed for CRP section later)
cartilage_overlapping <- cartilage_trimmed %>%
  filter(Row.names %in% stress_overlap_genes)

# ── Priority-ordered gene list for plotting ──────────────────────────────────
priority_genes <- c("Bmal1", "Npas2", "Cry1", "Nr1d1", "Per1", "Per2", "Per3", "Dbp", "Tef")
overlap_genes  <- unique(na.omit(cartilage_overlapping$mgi_symbol))
ordered_genes  <- c(
  priority_genes[priority_genes %in% overlap_genes],
  sort(setdiff(overlap_genes, priority_genes))
)

p_overlapping <- plot_multiple_genes(dataset_list, ordered_genes, show_line = TRUE)
p_overlapping

ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig1C_overlapping_genes.pdf",
       plot = p_overlapping, width = 9, height = 13)
ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig1C_overlapping_genes.png",
       plot = p_overlapping, width = 9, height = 13)
```

```{r Fig2A_rose_plots_combined}
# ── Phase distribution data ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
phase_distribution_data <- bind_rows(
  osmo_trimmed      %>% mutate(dataset = "Osmotic Stress") %>% dplyr::select(phase, dataset),
  dex_trimmed       %>% mutate(dataset = "Dexamethasone")  %>% dplyr::select(phase, dataset),
  hs_trimmed        %>% mutate(dataset = "Heat Shock")     %>% dplyr::select(phase, dataset),
  cartilage_trimmed %>% mutate(dataset = "Cartilage")      %>% dplyr::select(phase, dataset)
) %>%
  mutate(phase_circular = ifelse(phase == 24, 0, phase))

phase_counts <- phase_distribution_data %>%
  group_by(dataset, phase_circular) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop")

p_rose_osmo      <- create_rose_plot(phase_counts, "Osmotic Stress")
p_rose_dex       <- create_rose_plot(phase_counts, "Dexamethasone")
p_rose_hs        <- create_rose_plot(phase_counts, "Heat Shock")
p_rose_cartilage <- create_rose_plot(phase_counts, "Cartilage")

p_rose_combined <- (p_rose_osmo | p_rose_dex) / (p_rose_hs | p_rose_cartilage)
p_rose_combined

ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig2A_rose_plots_combined.pdf",
       plot = p_rose_combined, width = 10, height = 10)
ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig2A_rose_plots_combined.png",
       plot = p_rose_combined, width = 8, height = 8, dpi = 600)
```

```{r pairwise_overlap_supp_table2}
# ── Full tested gene sets (universe per pair = intersection) ─────────────────
gene_universes <- list(
  Osmo      = osmo_data$Row.names,
  Dex       = dex_data$Row.names,
  HS        = hs_data$Row.names,
  Cartilage = cartilage_data$Row.names
)

gene_lists <- list(
  Osmo      = osmo_trimmed$Row.names,
  Dex       = dex_trimmed$Row.names,
  HS        = hs_trimmed$Row.names,
  Cartilage = cartilage_trimmed$Row.names
)

dataset_names <- names(gene_lists)
n_datasets    <- length(dataset_names)

run_pairwise_overlap <- function(gene_lists, gene_universes, bhq_label) {
  results <- data.frame()
  ds_names <- names(gene_lists)
  for (i in 1:(length(ds_names) - 1)) {
    for (j in (i + 1):length(ds_names)) {
      name1        <- ds_names[i]
      name2        <- ds_names[j]
      pair_universe <- intersect(gene_universes[[name1]], gene_universes[[name2]])
      res          <- hypergeometric_test_pairwise_universe(
        gene_lists[[name1]], gene_lists[[name2]], pair_universe)
      results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
        Dataset1        = name1,
        Dataset2        = name2,
        Universe_Size   = res$universe_size,
        Size1           = res$size1,
        Size2           = res$size2,
        Overlap         = res$overlap,
        Expected        = round(res$expected, 2),
        Fold_Enrichment = round(res$fold_enrichment, 2),
        Jaccard_Index   = round(res$jaccard, 3),
        P_value         = res$p_value,
        Significant     = ifelse(res$p_value < 0.05, "Yes", "No"),
        BH.Q.cut.off    = bhq_label,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
  results %>%
    mutate(
      BH_adjusted_P_value = p.adjust(P_value, method = "BH"),
      Significant_BH = ifelse(BH_adjusted_P_value < 0.05, "Yes", "No")
    )
}

results_05 <- run_pairwise_overlap(gene_lists, gene_universes, "0.05")

gene_lists_01 <- list(
  Osmo      = osmo_data      %>% filter(BH.Q <= 0.01) %>% pull(Row.names),
  Dex       = dex_data       %>% filter(BH.Q <= 0.01) %>% pull(Row.names),
  HS        = hs_data        %>% filter(BH.Q <= 0.01) %>% pull(Row.names),
  Cartilage = cartilage_data %>% filter(BH.Q <= 0.01) %>% pull(Row.names)
)
results_01 <- run_pairwise_overlap(gene_lists_01, gene_universes, "0.01")

pairwise_universe_results <- results_05  # used downstream

supp2 <- bind_rows(results_05, results_01) %>%
  dplyr::rename(`BH.Q cut-off` = BH.Q.cut.off) %>%
  relocate(BH_adjusted_P_value, .after = P_value) %>%
  relocate(Significant_BH, .after = Significant)

write.csv(supp2,
          "results/publication_figures/Supplementary_table_2.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
cat("Supplementary_table_2.csv saved.\n")
print(results_05)
```

```{r Fig1D_jaccard_4way_comparison}
# ── Build symmetric 4x4 Jaccard matrix ──────────────────────────────────────
jaccard_mat <- matrix(1, nrow = n_datasets, ncol = n_datasets,
                      dimnames = list(dataset_names, dataset_names))

for (k in seq_len(nrow(pairwise_universe_results))) {
  n1 <- as.character(pairwise_universe_results$Dataset1[k])
  n2 <- as.character(pairwise_universe_results$Dataset2[k])
  j  <- as.numeric(pairwise_universe_results$Jaccard_Index[k])
  jaccard_mat[n1, n2] <- j
  jaccard_mat[n2, n1] <- j
}

p_jaccard <- pheatmap(
  jaccard_mat,
  display_numbers  = TRUE,
  number_format    = "%.3f",
  cluster_rows     = FALSE,
  cluster_cols     = FALSE,
  color            = colorRampPalette(c("white", "orange", "red"))(100),
  main             = "Jaccard similarity of rhythmic gene sets (BH.Q < 0.05)\nPair-specific universe",
  fontsize_number  = 12,
  fontsize         = 12
)

ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig1D_jaccard_4way_comparison.pdf",
       plot = p_jaccard, width = 6, height = 5)
ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig1D_jaccard_4way_comparison.png",
       plot = p_jaccard, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r crp_setup}
# ── Core clock gene set ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
core_clock_genes <- c("Bmal1", "Clock", "Per1", "Per2", "Per3",
                      "Cry1", "Cry2", "Nr1d1", "Nr1d2", "Dbp", "Tef", "Npas2")

datasets <- list(
  Osmo      = osmo_trimmed,
  Dex       = dex_trimmed,
  HS        = hs_trimmed,
  Cartilage = cartilage_trimmed
)

# ── Supplementary Table 3: core clock gene absolute phases ───────────────────
clock_phases <- data.frame()
for (ds_name in names(datasets)) {
  ds <- datasets[[ds_name]]
  for (gene in core_clock_genes) {
    ph <- get_phase_by_symbol(ds, gene)
    clock_phases <- rbind(clock_phases, data.frame(
      dataset = ds_name, gene = gene, phase = ph,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
}

clock_wide <- clock_phases %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = dataset, values_from = phase)

cat("=== CORE CLOCK GENE PHASES ===\n")
print(clock_wide)

write.csv(clock_wide,
          "results/publication_figures/Supplementary_table_3.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

# ── Compute clock-relative phases (CRP) for all datasets ────────────────────
ref_gene   <- "Bmal1"
ref_phases <- clock_phases %>%
  filter(gene == ref_gene) %>%
  dplyr::select(dataset, ref_phase = phase)

cat("\n=== Bmal1 reference phases ===\n")
print(ref_phases)

for (ds_name in names(datasets)) {
  ref_ph <- ref_phases$ref_phase[ref_phases$dataset == ds_name]
  if (length(ref_ph) == 0 || is.na(ref_ph)) {
    warning(ref_gene, " not found in ", ds_name, " – skipping CRP computation")
    next
  }
  datasets[[ds_name]] <- compute_clock_relative_phase(datasets[[ds_name]], ref_ph)
}

# ── Build CRP data for 3-way stress overlap genes ────────────────────────────
stress_overlap_genes_symbols <- datasets[["Osmo"]] %>%
  filter(Row.names %in% stress_overlap_genes) %>%
  pull(mgi_symbol) %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  unique()

cat(sprintf("\nAnalysing %d genes common to all 3 stress datasets\n",
            length(stress_overlap_genes_symbols)))

stress_ds_names <- c("Osmo", "Dex", "HS")
crp_data <- data.frame()

for (ds_name in stress_ds_names) {
  ds <- datasets[[ds_name]]
  for (gene_sym in stress_overlap_genes_symbols) {
    row <- ds %>% filter(mgi_symbol == gene_sym)
    if (nrow(row) > 0 && !is.na(row$clock_relative_phase[1])) {
      crp_data <- rbind(crp_data, data.frame(
        gene                 = gene_sym,
        dataset              = ds_name,
        absolute_phase       = row$phase[1],
        clock_relative_phase = row$clock_relative_phase[1],
        stringsAsFactors     = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}

# ── Three-way CRP concordance and permutation test ───────────────────────────
# RAIN phases are discrete 4 h values. Shuffling whole CRP vectors preserves
# each dataset's observed phase-bin frequencies (including ties) while breaking
# the gene-wise correspondence between datasets.
circ_dist_threshold_3way <- 4

crp_wide_3way <- crp_data %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, dataset, clock_relative_phase) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = dataset, values_from = clock_relative_phase) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Osmo), !is.na(Dex), !is.na(HS))

three_way_gene_results <- crp_wide_3way %>%
  mutate(
    dist_osmo_dex_h = circ_dist_24(Osmo, Dex),
    dist_osmo_hs_h  = circ_dist_24(Osmo, HS),
    dist_dex_hs_h   = circ_dist_24(Dex, HS),
    max_pairwise_dist_h = pmax(dist_osmo_dex_h, dist_osmo_hs_h, dist_dex_hs_h),
    three_way_concordant = max_pairwise_dist_h <= circ_dist_threshold_3way
  )

n_genes_3way  <- nrow(three_way_gene_results)
obs_3way_n    <- sum(three_way_gene_results$three_way_concordant)
obs_3way_pct  <- 100 * obs_3way_n / n_genes_3way
n_perm_3way   <- 10000
seed_3way     <- 42

set.seed(seed_3way)
perm_3way_pcts <- replicate(n_perm_3way, {
  dex_perm <- sample(three_way_gene_results$Dex)
  hs_perm  <- sample(three_way_gene_results$HS)

  dist_osmo_dex <- circ_dist_24(three_way_gene_results$Osmo, dex_perm)
  dist_osmo_hs  <- circ_dist_24(three_way_gene_results$Osmo, hs_perm)
  dist_dex_hs   <- circ_dist_24(dex_perm, hs_perm)

  concordant <- dist_osmo_dex <= circ_dist_threshold_3way &
    dist_osmo_hs <= circ_dist_threshold_3way &
    dist_dex_hs <= circ_dist_threshold_3way

  100 * mean(concordant)
})

n_perm_as_or_more_extreme <- sum(perm_3way_pcts >= obs_3way_pct)
# Add the observed arrangement to the Monte Carlo reference distribution so
# that the estimated permutation p-value cannot be zero.
perm_3way_p <- (n_perm_as_or_more_extreme + 1) / (n_perm_3way + 1)

three_way_summary <- data.frame(
  comparison                 = "Osmo_vs_Dex_vs_HS",
  n_genes                    = n_genes_3way,
  n_concordant               = obs_3way_n,
  pct_concordant             = round(obs_3way_pct, 1),
  threshold_h                = circ_dist_threshold_3way,
  perm_null_mean_pct         = round(mean(perm_3way_pcts), 1),
  perm_null_sd_pct           = round(sd(perm_3way_pcts), 2),
  perm_p_value               = perm_3way_p,
  n_permutations             = n_perm_3way,
  n_perm_as_or_more_extreme  = n_perm_as_or_more_extreme,
  seed                       = seed_3way,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  three_way_summary,
  "results/publication_figures/crp_3way_summary.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("\n=== THREE-WAY CRP PERMUTATION TEST ===\n")
print(three_way_summary)

# ── CRP consistency ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
consistency_threshold <- 0.75

crp_consistency <- crp_data %>%
  group_by(gene) %>%
  summarise(
    n_datasets  = n(),
    mean_crp    = mean(clock_relative_phase),
    sd_crp      = sd(clock_relative_phase),
    range_crp   = max(clock_relative_phase) - min(clock_relative_phase),
    circ_sd_crp = {
      vals <- circular(clock_relative_phase, units = "hours", template = "none")
      rho  <- min(rho.circular(vals), 1.0)
      as.numeric(sqrt(-2 * log(rho)))
    },
    phases     = paste(sprintf("%s:%s",   dataset, absolute_phase),       collapse = ", "),
    crp_values = paste(sprintf("%s:%.1f", dataset, clock_relative_phase), collapse = ", "),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n_datasets == length(stress_ds_names)) %>%
  arrange(circ_sd_crp) %>%
  left_join(
    three_way_gene_results %>%
      dplyr::select(gene, dist_osmo_dex_h, dist_osmo_hs_h, dist_dex_hs_h,
                    max_pairwise_dist_h, three_way_concordant),
    by = "gene"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    classification = ifelse(three_way_concordant,
                            "Clock-controlled", "Variable"),
    is_core_clock  = gene %in% core_clock_genes
  )

# For phases restricted to the 4 h RAIN grid, the historical circular-SD
# threshold and the explicit all-pairwise-distance criterion should agree.
if (any((crp_consistency$circ_sd_crp <= consistency_threshold) !=
        crp_consistency$three_way_concordant)) {
  stop("Circular-SD and explicit three-way CRP classifications disagree.")
}

cat(sprintf("\nClock-controlled: %d  |  Variable: %d\n",
            sum(crp_consistency$classification == "Clock-controlled"),
            sum(crp_consistency$classification == "Variable")))

# ── Supplementary Table 1 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
write.csv(crp_consistency,
          "results/publication_figures/Supplementary_table_1.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
cat("Supplementary_table_1.csv saved.\n")
```

```{r Fig2E_clock_relative_phase_heatmap}
consistent_genes <- crp_consistency %>%
  filter(classification == "Clock-controlled") %>%
  arrange(mean_crp) %>%
  pull(gene)

if (length(consistent_genes) > 0) {
  heatmap_data <- crp_data %>%
    filter(gene %in% consistent_genes) %>%
    dplyr::select(gene, dataset, clock_relative_phase) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = dataset, values_from = clock_relative_phase) %>%
    column_to_rownames("gene")

  gene_order   <- crp_consistency %>%
    filter(gene %in% consistent_genes) %>%
    arrange(mean_crp) %>%
    pull(gene)
  heatmap_data <- heatmap_data[gene_order, , drop = FALSE]
  heatmap_mat  <- as.matrix(heatmap_data)

  p_crp_heatmap <- pheatmap(
    heatmap_mat,
    cluster_rows     = FALSE,
    cluster_cols     = FALSE,
    color            = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
    breaks           = seq(-12, 12, length.out = 101),
    main             = sprintf(
      "Clock-relative phases: consistent genes (n=%d)\nHours from Bmal1 peak",
      length(consistent_genes)),
    fontsize_row     = ifelse(length(consistent_genes) > 40, 6, 8),
    show_rownames    = length(consistent_genes) <= 60,
    fontsize         = 10
  )

  fig_h <- max(4, length(consistent_genes) * 0.15 + 2)
  ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig2E_clock_relative_phase_heatmap.pdf",
         plot = p_crp_heatmap, width = 6, height = fig_h)
  ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig2E_clock_relative_phase_heatmap.png",
         plot = p_crp_heatmap, width = 6, height = fig_h, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r crp_pairwise}
circ_dist_threshold <- 4  # hours

ds_pairs <- list(
  c("Osmo", "Dex"),
  c("Osmo", "HS"),
  c("Osmo", "Cartilage"),
  c("Dex",  "HS"),
  c("Dex",  "Cartilage"),
  c("HS",   "Cartilage")
)

pairwise_crp_results <- list()
pairwise_summary     <- data.frame()

for (pair in ds_pairs) {
  d1    <- pair[1];  d2 <- pair[2]
  label <- paste(d1, d2, sep = "_vs_")

  shared_ids <- intersect(datasets[[d1]]$Row.names, datasets[[d2]]$Row.names)

  df1 <- datasets[[d1]] %>%
    filter(Row.names %in% shared_ids) %>%
    dplyr::select(gene = mgi_symbol, id = Row.names,
                  crp_1 = clock_relative_phase, abs_1 = phase) %>%
    mutate(dataset1 = d1)

  df2 <- datasets[[d2]] %>%
    filter(Row.names %in% shared_ids) %>%
    dplyr::select(id = Row.names, crp_2 = clock_relative_phase, abs_2 = phase) %>%
    mutate(dataset2 = d2)

  merged <- inner_join(df1, df2, by = "id") %>%
    filter(!is.na(crp_1), !is.na(crp_2)) %>%
    mutate(circ_dist      = circ_dist_24(crp_1, crp_2),
           classification = ifelse(circ_dist <= circ_dist_threshold,
                                   "Clock-controlled", "Variable"))

  n_total      <- nrow(merged)
  n_controlled <- sum(merged$classification == "Clock-controlled")
  pct          <- 100 * n_controlled / n_total

  pairwise_crp_results[[label]] <- merged
  pairwise_summary <- rbind(pairwise_summary, data.frame(
    pair                 = label,
    dataset1             = d1,
    dataset2             = d2,
    n_shared_genes       = n_total,
    n_clock_controlled   = n_controlled,
    pct_clock_controlled = round(pct, 1),
    threshold_h          = circ_dist_threshold,
    stringsAsFactors     = FALSE
  ))
}

# ── Permutation tests ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
set.seed(42)
n_perm     <- 1000
stat_results <- data.frame()

for (pair in ds_pairs) {
  d1    <- pair[1];  d2 <- pair[2]
  label <- paste(d1, d2, sep = "_vs_")
  df    <- pairwise_crp_results[[label]]
  n_genes  <- nrow(df)
  obs_pct  <- 100 * sum(df$classification == "Clock-controlled") / n_genes

  perm_pcts <- replicate(n_perm, {
    crp_2_perm <- sample(df$crp_2)
    dists      <- circ_dist_24(df$crp_1, crp_2_perm)
    100 * sum(dists <= circ_dist_threshold) / n_genes
  })

  perm_p         <- mean(perm_pcts >= obs_pct)
  perm_null_mean <- mean(perm_pcts)
  perm_null_sd   <- sd(perm_pcts)

  stat_results <- rbind(stat_results, data.frame(
    pair                 = label,
    obs_pct_cc           = round(obs_pct, 1),
    perm_null_mean_pct   = round(perm_null_mean, 1),
    perm_null_sd_pct     = round(perm_null_sd, 2),
    perm_p_value         = perm_p,
    stringsAsFactors     = FALSE
  ))
}

stat_results <- stat_results %>%
  mutate(perm_p_BH = p.adjust(perm_p_value, method = "BH"))

pairwise_summary <- pairwise_summary %>%
  left_join(stat_results %>%
    dplyr::select(pair, perm_null_mean_pct, perm_null_sd_pct,
                  perm_p_value, perm_p_BH),
    by = "pair")

write.csv(pairwise_summary,
          "results/publication_figures/crp_pairwise_summary.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

# ── Figure: Fig2C_crp_pairwise_proportion ─────────────────────────────────────
p_bar <- ggplot(pairwise_summary, aes(x = pair)) +
  geom_col(aes(y = pct_clock_controlled, fill = pair),
           colour = "black", width = 0.6) +
  geom_col(aes(y = perm_null_mean_pct),
           fill = "grey30", alpha = 0.5, width = 0.25) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = perm_null_mean_pct - 2 * perm_null_sd_pct,
                    ymax = perm_null_mean_pct + 2 * perm_null_sd_pct),
                width = 0.12, colour = "grey10", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(y    = pct_clock_controlled,
                label = sprintf(
                  "%d/%d (%.0f%%)\np=%s",
                  n_clock_controlled, n_shared_genes, pct_clock_controlled,
                  dplyr::case_when(
                    perm_p_BH == 0   ~ "<0.001",
                    perm_p_BH >= 0.1 ~ sprintf("%.2f",  perm_p_BH),
                    TRUE             ~ sprintf("%.3f", perm_p_BH)
                  ))),
            vjust = -0.3, size = 3, lineheight = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2", guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.18))) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    title    = "Proportion of pairwise-overlap genes with consistent clock-relative phase",
    subtitle = sprintf(
      "Threshold: circular distance \u2264 %gh from Bmal1  |  dark bar = permutation null \u00b1 2 SD",
      circ_dist_threshold),
    x = NULL, y = "% clock-controlled"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 30, hjust = 1))

p_bar
ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig2C_crp_pairwise_proportion.pdf",
       plot = p_bar, width = 5, height = 5)
ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig2C_crp_pairwise_proportion.png",
       plot = p_bar, width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300)

# ── Figure: Fig2B_pairwise_CRP_comparison ───────────────────────────────────────────
scatter_plots <- list()

for (pair in ds_pairs) {
  d1    <- pair[1];  d2 <- pair[2]
  label <- paste(d1, d2, sep = "_vs_")
  df    <- pairwise_crp_results[[label]]

  n_total      <- nrow(df)
  n_controlled <- sum(df$classification == "Clock-controlled")

  df_counts <- df %>%
    group_by(crp_1, crp_2, classification) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

  p <- ggplot(df_counts,
              aes(x = crp_1, y = crp_2, colour = classification, size = n)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1,
                linetype = "dashed", colour = "red", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_abline(intercept =  circ_dist_threshold, slope = 1,
                linetype = "dotted", colour = "grey40") +
    geom_abline(intercept = -circ_dist_threshold, slope = 1,
                linetype = "dotted", colour = "grey40") +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c("Clock-controlled" = "#4C9BE8",
                                   "Variable"         = "#E87B4C")) +
    scale_size_area(name = "Gene Count", max_size = 15, breaks = c(1, 3, 5, 10)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-12, 12, by = 4)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-12, 12, by = 4)) +
    coord_fixed(ratio = 1, xlim = c(-13, 13), ylim = c(-13, 13)) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position = "right",
          plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.title    = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.text     = element_text(size = 12),
          legend.text   = element_text(size = 12),
          legend.title  = element_text(size = 12)) +
    guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 4)),
           size   = guide_legend(override.aes = list(alpha = 0.8))) +
    labs(title    = sprintf("%s vs %s", d1, d2),
         subtitle = sprintf("n = %d genes | clock-controlled: %d (%.1f%%)",
                            n_total, n_controlled, 100 * n_controlled / n_total),
         x = sprintf("%s CRP (h from Bmal1)", d1),
         y = sprintf("%s CRP (h from Bmal1)", d2),
         colour = NULL)
  scatter_plots[[label]] <- p
}

p_scatter_combined <- wrap_plots(scatter_plots, ncol = 3)
p_scatter_combined

ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig2B_pairwise_CRP_comparison.pdf",
       plot = p_scatter_combined, width = 17, height = 11)
ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig2B_pairwise_CRP_comparison.png",
       plot = p_scatter_combined, width = 17, height = 11, dpi = 300)
```

```{r enrichment_supp_table4}
# ── Load frozen local pathway annotations ────────────────────────────────────
categories <- c("KEGG", "RCTM", "WikiPathways")
category_names <- c(
  KEGG = "KEGG Pathways",
  RCTM = "Reactome",
  WikiPathways = "WikiPathways"
)
min_pathway_size <- 5L
pathway_fdr_cutoff <- 0.05

string_terms_path <- resolve_reference_file(
  "10090.protein.enrichment.terms.v12.0.txt.gz",
  paste0(
    "https://stringdb-downloads.org/download/",
    "protein.enrichment.terms.v12.0/",
    "10090.protein.enrichment.terms.v12.0.txt.gz"
  )
)
string_aliases_path <- resolve_reference_file(
  "10090.protein.aliases.v12.0.txt.gz",
  paste0(
    "https://stringdb-downloads.org/download/protein.aliases.v12.0/",
    "10090.protein.aliases.v12.0.txt.gz"
  ),
  existing_paths = "results/cache/stringdb/10090.protein.aliases.v12.0.txt.gz"
)
kegg_pathway_names_path <- resolve_reference_file(
  "mmu_kegg_pathway_names_raw.tsv",
  "https://rest.kegg.jp/list/pathway/mmu"
)
kegg_pathway_genes_path <- resolve_reference_file(
  "mmu_kegg_pathway_genes_raw.tsv",
  "https://rest.kegg.jp/link/mmu/pathway"
)

string_terms <- read_filtered_tsv_gz(
  string_terms_path,
  pattern = "\t(Reactome Pathways|WikiPathways)\t",
  column_names = c(
    "string_protein_id", "string_category", "term", "description"
  )
)

string_aliases <- read_filtered_tsv_gz(
  string_aliases_path,
  pattern = "\t(Ensembl_gene|KEGG_GENEID)$",
  column_names = c("string_protein_id", "alias", "source")
)

# Collapse protein isoforms to unique Ensembl gene-to-term relationships.
protein_gene_map <- string_aliases %>%
  filter(source == "Ensembl_gene", grepl("^ENSMUSG", alias)) %>%
  transmute(
    string_protein_id,
    gene_id = normalise_ensembl_gene_ids(alias)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene_id)) %>%
  distinct()

string_annotation_map <- string_terms %>%
  filter(string_category %in% c("Reactome Pathways", "WikiPathways")) %>%
  inner_join(protein_gene_map, by = "string_protein_id") %>%
  transmute(
    gene_id,
    category = recode(
      string_category,
      "Reactome Pathways" = "RCTM",
      "WikiPathways" = "WikiPathways"
    ),
    term,
    description
  ) %>%
  distinct()

kegg_pathway_genes <- read.delim(
  kegg_pathway_genes_path,
  header = FALSE, sep = "\t", quote = "", comment.char = "",
  col.names = c("pathway_id", "kegg_gene_id"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  transmute(
    term = sub("^path:", "", pathway_id),
    ncbi_gene_id = sub("^mmu:", "", kegg_gene_id)
  ) %>%
  distinct()

kegg_pathway_names <- read.delim(
  kegg_pathway_names_path,
  header = FALSE, sep = "\t", quote = "", comment.char = "",
  col.names = c("term", "description"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(description = sub(
    " - Mus musculus \\(house mouse\\)$", "", description
  )) %>%
  distinct(term, .keep_all = TRUE)

kegg_protein_map <- string_aliases %>%
  filter(source == "KEGG_GENEID") %>%
  transmute(string_protein_id, ncbi_gene_id = alias) %>%
  distinct()

kegg_annotation_map <- kegg_pathway_genes %>%
  inner_join(kegg_protein_map, by = "ncbi_gene_id") %>%
  inner_join(protein_gene_map, by = "string_protein_id") %>%
  inner_join(kegg_pathway_names, by = "term") %>%
  transmute(gene_id, category = "KEGG", term, description) %>%
  distinct()

pathway_annotation_map <- bind_rows(
  kegg_annotation_map,
  string_annotation_map
) %>%
  distinct(gene_id, category, term, .keep_all = TRUE)

# Normalize the tested and rhythmic gene sets once for the two retained
# background strategies.
normalised_gene_universes <- lapply(
  gene_universes,
  function(x) unique(na.omit(normalise_ensembl_gene_ids(x)))
)
mapped_genes <- unique(na.omit(protein_gene_map$gene_id))
normalised_rhythmic_genes <- lapply(
  gene_lists,
  function(x) unique(na.omit(normalise_ensembl_gene_ids(x)))
)

if (length(mapped_genes) == 0) {
  stop("No mouse Ensembl genes were mapped through STRING aliases.",
       call. = FALSE)
}

# ── Permutation tests of enriched-term Jaccard overlap ──────────────────
# Observed enrichment uses BH-adjusted P <= 0.05. The permutation null retains
# the top N terms ranked by raw enrichment P-value, where N equals the observed
# enriched-list size. This conditions the overlap test on list size even when a
# random gene set would yield no FDR-significant terms.
n_perm_enrichment <- 1000L

# ── Background sensitivity analyses ─────────────────────────────────────
strategy_descriptions <- c(
  pair_specific_common =
    "Genes tested in both datasets in each pair and mapped to STRING",
  all_mouse = "All mouse genes mapped to STRING"
)
strategy_seeds <- c(
  pair_specific_common = 43000L,
  all_mouse = 44000L
)
# Pair-specific base seeds are spaced by 10. Within each pair, category offsets
# 0/1/2 give each permutation an independently reproducible random-number stream.


# Primary analysis: for each comparison, enrich both rhythmic gene sets against
# genes tested in that pair. A dataset can therefore have different enriched
# terms in different pairwise contexts.
cat("\n=== PAIR-SPECIFIC COMMON BACKGROUNDS ===\n")
pair_specific_enrichment_outputs <- list()
pair_specific_overlap_outputs <- list()

for (pair_index in seq_along(ds_pairs)) {
  pair <- ds_pairs[[pair_index]]
  name1 <- pair[1]
  name2 <- pair[2]
  pair_label <- paste(name1, name2, sep = "_vs_")
  pair_background <- Reduce(
    intersect,
    normalised_gene_universes[c(name1, name2)]
  )
  pair_background <- intersect(pair_background, mapped_genes)

  if (length(pair_background) == 0) {
    stop("No common STRING-mapped genes for pair ", pair_label,
         call. = FALSE)
  }

  cat("\n", pair_label, " background: ", length(pair_background),
      " genes\n", sep = "")
  pair_gene_sets <- setNames(lapply(c(name1, name2), function(ds_name) {
    intersect(normalised_rhythmic_genes[[ds_name]], pair_background)
  }), c(name1, name2))
  pair_models <- build_pathway_models(
    pathway_annotation_map,
    pair_background,
    categories,
    category_names,
    min_term_size = min_pathway_size
  )
  pair_enrichment_list <- calculate_enrichment_lists(
    pair_gene_sets,
    pair_models,
    categories,
    fdr_cutoff = pathway_fdr_cutoff
  )

  pair_specific_enrichment_outputs[[pair_label]] <-
    format_enrichment_collection(
      pair_enrichment_list,
      "pair_specific_common",
      strategy_descriptions[["pair_specific_common"]],
      pair_label,
      length(pair_background)
    )
  pair_specific_overlap_outputs[[pair_label]] <- run_pathway_overlap_pair(
    "pair_specific_common",
    strategy_descriptions[["pair_specific_common"]],
    pair,
    pair_background,
    pair_gene_sets,
    pair_enrichment_list,
    pair_models,
    categories,
    category_names,
    n_perm_enrichment,
    strategy_seeds[["pair_specific_common"]] + 10L * pair_index
  )
}

pair_specific_enrichment_output <- bind_rows(
  pair_specific_enrichment_outputs
)
pair_specific_overlap_results <- bind_rows(pair_specific_overlap_outputs)

# Sensitivity analysis: use all mouse genes mapped through the same STRING v12
# alias resource. The enrichment code, annotations, filters and overlap test
# remain unchanged, isolating the effect of the background definition.
cat("\n=== ALL-MOUSE BACKGROUND ===\n")
all_mouse_background <- mapped_genes
cat("Background:", length(all_mouse_background), "genes\n")

all_mouse_rhythmic_gene_sets <- lapply(
  normalised_rhythmic_genes,
  function(x) intersect(x, all_mouse_background)
)
for (ds_name in names(all_mouse_rhythmic_gene_sets)) {
  cat(ds_name, "rhythmic genes in background:",
      length(all_mouse_rhythmic_gene_sets[[ds_name]]), "\n")
}

all_mouse_pathway_models <- build_pathway_models(
  pathway_annotation_map,
  all_mouse_background,
  categories,
  category_names,
  min_term_size = min_pathway_size
)
all_mouse_enrichment_list <- calculate_enrichment_lists(
  all_mouse_rhythmic_gene_sets,
  all_mouse_pathway_models,
  categories,
  fdr_cutoff = pathway_fdr_cutoff
)
all_mouse_enrichment_output <- format_enrichment_collection(
  all_mouse_enrichment_list,
  "all_mouse",
  strategy_descriptions[["all_mouse"]],
  "All_pairs",
  length(all_mouse_background)
)

all_mouse_overlap_results <- bind_rows(lapply(
  seq_along(ds_pairs),
  function(pair_index) {
    run_pathway_overlap_pair(
      "all_mouse",
      strategy_descriptions[["all_mouse"]],
      ds_pairs[[pair_index]],
      all_mouse_background,
      all_mouse_rhythmic_gene_sets,
      all_mouse_enrichment_list,
      all_mouse_pathway_models,
      categories,
      category_names,
      n_perm_enrichment,
      strategy_seeds[["all_mouse"]] + 10L * pair_index
    )
  }
))

# The two sets of 18 P-values are adjusted separately within each background
# strategy because they address different reference populations.
pathway_overlap_background_comparison <- adjust_pathway_overlap_p_values(
  bind_rows(
    pair_specific_overlap_results,
    all_mouse_overlap_results
  )
)
pathway_enrichment_background_comparison <- bind_rows(
  pair_specific_enrichment_output,
  all_mouse_enrichment_output
)

# The all-mouse analysis supplies the functional-enrichment figures because the
# pair-specific enriched-term lists are too sparse for informative figures.
rhythmic_gene_sets <- all_mouse_rhythmic_gene_sets
pathway_models <- all_mouse_pathway_models
enrichment_list <- all_mouse_enrichment_list
enrichment_overlap_results <- pathway_overlap_background_comparison %>%
  filter(Background_Strategy == "all_mouse")

local_pathway_enrichment <- all_mouse_enrichment_output %>%
  dplyr::select(dataset, category, term, number_of_genes,
                number_of_genes_in_background, p_value, fdr, description)

write.csv(
  local_pathway_enrichment,
  "results/publication_figures/local_pathway_enrichment.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  pathway_enrichment_background_comparison,
  paste0(
    "results/publication_figures/",
    "pathway_enrichment_background_comparison.csv"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)
write.csv(
  pathway_overlap_background_comparison,
  paste0(
    "results/publication_figures/",
    "pathway_overlap_background_comparison.csv"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

supplementary_table_4 <- pathway_overlap_background_comparison %>%
  transmute(
    Background = recode(
      Background_Strategy,
      pair_specific_common = "Pair-specific tested-gene background",
      all_mouse = "All-mouse background"
    ),
    Dataset_1 = Dataset1,
    Dataset_2 = Dataset2,
    Annotation_category = Category,
    Background_genes = Background_Genes,
    Rhythmic_genes_D1 = Rhythmic_Genes_D1,
    Rhythmic_genes_D2 = Rhythmic_Genes_D2,
    Eligible_terms = Eligible_Terms,
    Enriched_terms_D1 = Enriched_Terms_D1,
    Enriched_terms_D2 = Enriched_Terms_D2,
    Overlapping_terms = Overlap,
    Jaccard_index = signif(Jaccard_Index, 4),
    Permutation_null_mean_Jaccard = signif(Perm_Null_Mean_Jaccard, 4),
    Permutation_P = signif(Perm_P_value, 4),
    Permutation_BH_adjusted_P = signif(Perm_P_BH, 4),
    Conditional_hypergeometric_BH_adjusted_P = signif(
      Conditional_Hypergeom_P_BH, 4
    ),
    Overlapping_term_IDs_and_names = Overlap_Terms
  )

write.csv(
  supplementary_table_4,
  "results/publication_figures/Supplementary_table_4.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
cat("Pathway background-comparison tables saved.\n")
cat(paste(
  "Supplementary_table_4.csv contains the publication columns for",
  "pair-specific and all-mouse results.\n"
))
print(pathway_overlap_background_comparison)
```

```{r enrichment_figures}
# ── Combined enrichment data for figures ─────────────────────────────────────
all_enrich <- bind_rows(lapply(names(enrichment_list), function(ds_name) {
  enrichment_list[[ds_name]] %>% mutate(dataset = ds_name)
})) %>%
  mutate(
    category_label = case_when(
      category == "KEGG"         ~ "KEGG Pathways",
      category == "RCTM"         ~ "Reactome",
      category == "WikiPathways" ~ "WikiPathways",
      TRUE                       ~ category
    ),
    neg_log10_fdr = -log10(fdr),
    dataset = factor(dataset, levels = c("Osmo", "Dex", "HS", "Cartilage"))
  )

dataset_colors <- c(Osmo = "#4C9BE8", Dex = "#E87B4C",
                    HS   = "#4CE87B", Cartilage = "#C44CE8")

# For readability, retain up to 20 of the strongest terms enriched in at least
# two datasets per annotation category. Terms are ranked by their least
# significant FDR among the datasets in which they are enriched.
max_shared_terms_per_category <- 20L
term_dataset_counts <- all_enrich %>%
  group_by(category_label, description) %>%
  summarise(
    n_datasets = n_distinct(dataset),
    worst_fdr = max(fdr),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n_datasets >= 2) %>%
  group_by(category_label) %>%
  slice_min(worst_fdr, n = max_shared_terms_per_category,
            with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

plot_data <- all_enrich %>%
  semi_join(term_dataset_counts, by = c("category_label", "description"))

# ── Figure: enrichment_jaccard_KEGG/RCTM/WikiPathways ───────────────────────
fig_cats <- c("KEGG", "RCTM", "WikiPathways")

for (cat_code in fig_cats) {
  cat_name    <- category_names[match(cat_code, categories)]
  cat_results <- enrichment_overlap_results %>% filter(Category == cat_name)

  jac_mat <- matrix(1, nrow = n_datasets, ncol = n_datasets,
                    dimnames = list(dataset_names, dataset_names))
  jac_labels <- matrix(sprintf("%.3f", jac_mat),
                       nrow = n_datasets, ncol = n_datasets,
                       dimnames = list(dataset_names, dataset_names))

  for (k in seq_len(nrow(cat_results))) {
    n1 <- as.character(cat_results$Dataset1[k])
    n2 <- as.character(cat_results$Dataset2[k])
    j  <- as.numeric(cat_results$Jaccard_Index[k])
    p_bh <- as.numeric(cat_results$Perm_P_BH[k])
    significance_symbol <- dplyr::case_when(
      p_bh < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_bh < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p_bh < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE         ~ ""
    )
    label <- paste0(sprintf("%.3f", j), significance_symbol)
    jac_mat[n1, n2] <- j
    jac_mat[n2, n1] <- j
    jac_labels[n1, n2] <- label
    jac_labels[n2, n1] <- label
  }

  p_jac <- pheatmap(jac_mat,
    display_numbers = jac_labels,
    cluster_rows    = FALSE, cluster_cols = FALSE,
    color           = colorRampPalette(c("white", "orange", "red"))(100),
    fontsize_number = 20, fontsize = 20)

  ggsave(sprintf("results/publication_figures/Fig3B_enrichment_jaccard_%s.pdf",  cat_code),
         plot = p_jac, width = 7, height = 6)
  ggsave(sprintf("results/publication_figures/Fig3B_enrichment_jaccard_%s.png", cat_code),
         plot = p_jac, width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 300)
}

# ── Figure: Supplementary_Figure1 ───────────────────────────────────────────
p_tile_kegg <- make_tile_heatmap(plot_data, "KEGG Pathways")
p_tile_rctm <- make_tile_heatmap(plot_data, "Reactome")
p_tile_wiki <- make_tile_heatmap(plot_data, "WikiPathways")

p_tile_combined <- p_tile_kegg / p_tile_rctm / p_tile_wiki +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "Shared enriched terms across datasets",
    subtitle = paste(
      "All-mouse background | up to 20 strongest terms present in",
      "\u2265 2 datasets | fill = -log10(FDR) | grey = absent/not significant"
    ))

p_tile_combined

ggsave("results/publication_figures/Supplementary_Figure1.pdf",
       plot = p_tile_combined, width = 10, height = 18)
ggsave("results/publication_figures/Supplementary_Figure1.png",
       plot = p_tile_combined, width = 8, height = 16, dpi = 300)

# ── Figure: Fig3A_enrichment_barchart ─────────────────────────────────────────────
top5_data <- all_enrich %>%
  group_by(category_label, dataset) %>%
  slice_min(order_by = fdr, n = 5, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(description = fct_reorder(description, neg_log10_fdr))

p_bar_kegg <- make_bar_chart(top5_data, "KEGG Pathways",  dataset_colors)
p_bar_rctm <- make_bar_chart(top5_data, "Reactome",       dataset_colors)
p_bar_wiki <- make_bar_chart(top5_data, "WikiPathways",   dataset_colors)

p_bar_combined <- p_bar_kegg / p_bar_rctm / p_bar_wiki +
  plot_annotation(title    = "Top 5 enriched terms per dataset",
                  subtitle = "All-mouse background | grouped by category")

p_bar_combined

ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig3A_enrichment_barchart.pdf",
       plot = p_bar_combined, width = 7, height = 10)
ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig3A_enrichment_barchart.png",
       plot = p_bar_combined, width = 7, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```
